skippedItems.detail: Duplicate raw input item in the same request.

No valid company-intake-candidates payload produced for request company-intake-2026-03-16T14-11-08-883Z. Claude diagnostics: marketplace-schema-invalid.
Claude's cached plugin marketplace metadata is schema-incompatible with the installed CLI.
Fix: Clear the stale marketplace cache under `~/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/` after removing the deprecated marketplace, then retry.
